title: DNA (Deoxyribonucleic Acid)
summary: The molecule that stores the information cells need to make proteins. DNA is a double-stranded helix (structures/double-helix) of nucleotides. Each nucleotide consists of a structures/phosphate-group, a molecules/deoxyribose sugar, and one of four structures/nitrogenous-base|nitrogenous bases: molecules/adenine|A, molecules/thymine|T, molecules/guanine|G, molecules/cytosine|C.
